reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Los playeros atentos y predispuestos. Una parada obligada para cargar combustible y seguir por los 7 lagos.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. The beach attendants are attentive and helpful. A must-stop to refuel and continue on to the 7 lakes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCNXZXODZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
El camping esta al lado de la ruta así que los ruidos son insoportables, si se busca desconectar y relajar no es ni cerca el lugar. El baño lejos pero limpios, único servicio bueno. Wifi no hay, solo en el sector de entrada. La parcela que encontramos al igual que otras no tenía enchufe cerca. Mucha gente.
No vale lo que sale realmente

(Translated by Google)
The campsite is next to the road, so the noise is unbearable. If you're looking to unwind and relax, this isn't even close. The bathroom is far away but clean, the only good service. There's no Wi-Fi, only at the entrance. The pitch we found, like others, didn't have a power outlet nearby. It's too crowded.
It's not worth the price it costs, really.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCeHVxSVh3EAE

Very good service, at this time of year there is a long queue but they are quick.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención.  Me informaron sobre el estado de las rutas, me asesoraron y acompañaron en resolver un problema con el auto.
Desde la atención en la cafetería hasta la limpieza de los baños.
Una calidad humana poca veces vista
el lavado del auto de lujo.
Gracias Eduardo, Lucas y Gabriel

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. They informed me about road conditions, advised me, and helped me resolve a problem with my car.
From the service in the cafeteria to the cleanliness of the restrooms.
A level of customer service rarely seen.

The car wash was top-notch.

Thank you, Eduardo, Lucas, and Gabriel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCd3NPT0hnEAE
